title: Arctium neurocentrum
intro: Arctium neurocentrum, also known as the Great Thistle or Great Burdock, is a biennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including treating skin conditions, reducing inflammation, and alleviating digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of A. neurocentrum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made from A. neurocentrum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
